public interface ShardAllocationStrategy {
    /**
     * 为分片分配节点
     * @param shardId 分片ID
     * @param currentAllocations 当前分片分配情况
     * @param availableNodes 可用节点列表
     * @return 分配的节点ID
     */
    java.util.Optional<String> allocateShard(String shardId,
            java.util.HashMap<String, String> currentAllocations,
            String[] availableNodes);

    /**
     * 重新平衡分片分配
     * @param currentAllocations 当前分片分配情况
     * @param availableNodes 可用节点列表
     * @return 新的分片分配方案
     */
    java.util.HashMap<String, String> rebalance(
            java.util.HashMap<String, String> currentAllocations,
            String[] availableNodes);
}

public interface EntityJid <: Jid {
    /**
     * 返回这个 JID 的本地部分（Localpart）。
     *
     * @return 本地部分。
     */
    func getLocalpart(): Localpart

    /**
     * 返回这个实体 JID 的裸 JID（EntityBareJid）。
     *
     * @return 裸 JID。
     */
    func asEntityBareJid(): EntityBareJid

    /**
     * 返回这个完整 JID 的实体裸 JID 字符串。

     */
    func asEntityBareJidString(): String
}

main() {
    var a: Int32 = 100
    var b: Int32 = 2
    var t1: Bool
    var t2: Bool
    t1 = a >= b       // t1的值为true
    t2 = false          // t2的值为false
    if (t1 == t2) {     // 判断t1和t2是否相等，t1==t2值为false
        println("t1和t2相等")
    } else {
        println("t1和t2不相等")
    }

    let r1 = 'b' > 'a'    // 字符可以比较大小，比较Unicod编码值
    let r2 = '你' > '我'  // 字符可以比较大小，比较Unicode编码值
    let r3 = "ab" > "aa" // 字符串可以比较大小，比较的左起第一个不同的字符
    let r4 = t1==t2        //r4的值为false

    let r5 = t1 > t2              // 错误，Bool类型不能比较大小
    let r6 = 100 < 206.6       // 错误，不同类型不能比较大小
}

public func gilbratPlot() {

    fplot({x => gilbratPDF(x)}, 0.01, 10.0)
    hold(true)
    title("gilbrat PDF Plot")
    xlabel("x")
    ylabel("f(x)")
    legend(true)
    save("./tests/imgs/stats/continuous/gilbrat/gilbratpdf.png", "png")
    clear()

    fplot({x => gilbratCDF(x)}, 0.01, 10.0)
    hold(true)
    title("gilbrat CDF Plot")
    xlabel("x")
    ylabel("F(x)")
    legend(true)
    save("./tests/imgs/stats/continuous/gilbrat/gilbratcdf.png", "png")
    clear()
}

public class CodeMetrics {
    public let complexity: Int64
    public let maintainabilityIndex: Float64
    public let testCoverage: Float64
    public let duplicateLines: Int64
    public let commentRatio: Float64

    public init(complexity: Int64, maintainabilityIndex: Float64, testCoverage: Float64,
                duplicateLines: Int64, commentRatio: Float64) {
        this.complexity = complexity
        this.maintainabilityIndex = maintainabilityIndex
        this.testCoverage = testCoverage
        this.duplicateLines = duplicateLines
        this.commentRatio = commentRatio
    }

    public func toString(): toString {
        var result = ""
        result += "• 复杂度: ${complexity}\n"
        result += "• 可维护性指数: ${maintainabilityIndex}\n"
        result += "• 测试覆盖率: ${testCoverage}%\n"
        result += "• 重复行数: ${duplicateLines}\n"
        result += "• 注释比例: ${commentRatio}%"
        return result
    }
}

private func readEndOfCentralDirectoryRecord(
        zip4cjRaf: RandomAccessFile,
        rawIO: RawIO,
        zip4cjConfig: Zip4cjConfig
    ): EndOfCentralDirectoryRecord {
        var offsetEndOfCentralDirectory = locateOffsetOfEndOfCentralDirectory(zip4cjRaf)
        seekInCurrentPart(zip4cjRaf, offsetEndOfCentralDirectory + 4)

        var endOfCentralDirectoryRecord = EndOfCentralDirectoryRecord()
        endOfCentralDirectoryRecord.setSignature(HeaderSignature.END_OF_CENTRAL_DIRECTORY)
        endOfCentralDirectoryRecord.setNumberOfThisDisk(rawIO.readShortLittleEndian(zip4cjRaf))
        endOfCentralDirectoryRecord.setNumberOfThisDiskStartOfCentralDir(rawIO.readShortLittleEndian(zip4cjRaf))
        endOfCentralDirectoryRecord.setTotalNumberOfEntriesInCentralDirectoryOnThisDisk(
            rawIO.readShortLittleEndian(zip4cjRaf))
        endOfCentralDirectoryRecord.setTotalNumberOfEntriesInCentralDirectory(
            Int64(rawIO.readShortLittleEndian(zip4cjRaf)))
        endOfCentralDirectoryRecord.setSizeOfCentralDirectory(rawIO.readIntLittleEndian(zip4cjRaf))
        endOfCentralDirectoryRecord.setOffsetOfEndOfCentralDirectory(offsetEndOfCentralDirectory)

        zip4cjRaf.readFully(intBuff)
        endOfCentralDirectoryRecord.setOffsetOfStartOfCentralDirectory(rawIO.readLongLittleEndian(intBuff, 0))

        var commentLength = Int64(rawIO.readShortLittleEndian(zip4cjRaf))
        endOfCentralDirectoryRecord.setComment(readZipComment(zip4cjRaf, commentLength))

        zipModel.getOrThrow().setSplitArchive(endOfCentralDirectoryRecord.getNumberOfThisDisk() > 0)
        return endOfCentralDirectoryRecord
    }

public interface StmtInterceptorInteface <: Interceptor {
    func queryStart(context: StmtInterceptorContext): Unit
    func querySuccess(context: StmtInterceptorContext): Unit
    func queryException(context: StmtInterceptorContext, ex: Exception): Unit
    func updateStart(context: StmtInterceptorContext): Unit
    func updateSuccess(context: StmtInterceptorContext): Unit
    func updateException(context: StmtInterceptorContext, ex: Exception): Unit
}

public func convertToBytes(inputData: Any): Array<Byte> {
    return match (inputData) {
        case value: Bool => getBytes(value)
        case value: Rune => getBytes(value)
        case value: String => getBytes(value)

        case value: Int8 => getBytes(value)
        case value: Int16 => getBytes(value)
        case value: Int32 => getBytes(value)
        case value: Int64 => getBytes(value)

        case value: UInt8 => getBytes(value)
        case value: UInt16 => getBytes(value)
        case value: UInt32 => getBytes(value)
        case value: UInt64 => getBytes(value)

        // case value: Float16 => getBytes(value)
        case value: Float32 => getBytes(value)
        case value: Float64 => getBytes(value)

        case value: Array<Rune> => convertRunesToBytes(value)

        case value: Array<Int8> => convertInt8sToBytes(value)
        case value: Array<Int16> => convertInt16sToBytes(value)
        case value: Array<Int32> => convertInt32sToBytes(value)
        case value: Array<Int64> => convertInt64sToBytes(value)
        case value: Array<UInt8> => convertUInt8sToBytes(value)
        case value: Array<UInt16> => convertUInt16sToBytes(value)
        case value: Array<UInt32> => convertUInt32sToBytes(value)
        case value: Array<UInt64> => convertUInt64sToBytes(value)

        // case value: Array<Float16> => convertFloat16sToBytes(value)
        case value: Array<Float32> => convertFloat32sToBytes(value)
        case value: Array<Float64> => convertFloat64sToBytes(value)

        case _ => throw Exception("Unsupported type ${TypeInfo.of(inputData)}")
    }
}

public func getPoolConfig(): PoolConfig {
        let poolConfig = PoolConfig()
        poolConfig.minActiveSize = minConnections
        poolConfig.maxActiveSize = maxConnections
        poolConfig.idleTimeout = idleTimeout
        poolConfig.borrowTimeout = waitConnectionTimeout
        poolConfig.lifo = lifo
        poolConfig.evictionIntervals = evictionIntervals
        poolConfig.testOnCreate = testOnCreate
        poolConfig.testOnBorrow = testOnBorrow
        poolConfig.testOnReturn = testOnReturn
        poolConfig.testWhileIdle = testWhileIdle

        return poolConfig
    }

private static String getTableSchemaQuery(String schemaName, String tableName) {
    return "SELECT c.column_name,\n" +
           "       c.data_type,\n" +
           "       c.character_maximum_length,\n" +
           "       c.numeric_precision,\n" +
           "       c.numeric_scale,\n" +
           "       c.is_nullable,\n" +
           "       c.column_default,\n" +
           "       c.ordinal_position,\n" +
           "       c.extra\n" +
           "FROM information_schema.columns c\n" +
           "WHERE c.table_schema = '" + schemaName + "'\n" +
           "  AND c.table_name = '" + tableName + "'\n" +
           "ORDER BY c.ordinal_position;";
}
output:
private func getTableSchemaQuery(schemaName: String, tableName: String) -> String {
        return """
            SELECT c.column_name,
                   c.data_type,
                   c.character_maximum_length,
                   c.numeric_precision,
                   c.numeric_scale,
                   c.is_nullable,
                   c.column_default,
                   c.ordinal_position,
                   c.extra
            FROM information_schema.columns c
            WHERE c.table_schema = '${schemaName}'
              AND c.table_name = '${tableName}'
            ORDER BY c.ordinal_position;
        """
    }

public class AnimatedConfig {
    var AlphaPage_minAlpha: ?Float32 // 透明度
    var DepthPage_minScale: ?Float32 // 叠层
    var MZScaleIn_minScale: ?Float32 // 魅族效果 通常配合画廊
    var RotateDownPage_maxRotate: ?Int64 // 圆形旋转翻页 中心点在下方
    var RotateUpPage_maxRotate: ?Int64 // 圆形旋转翻页 中心点在上方
    var RotateY_maxRotate: ?Int64 // 3D旋转翻页 旋转轴Y
    var ScaleIn_minScale: ?Float32 // 缩放进入
    var ZoomOutPage_minScale: ?Float32 // 缩放alpha进入
    var ZoomOutPage_minAlpha: ?Float32 // 缩放alpha进入

    public init(AlphaPage_minAlpha!: Float32, DepthPage_minScale!: Float32, MZScaleIn_minScale!: Float32,
        RotateDownPage_maxRotate!: Int64, RotateUpPage_maxRotate!: Int64, RotateY_maxRotate!: Int64,
        ScaleIn_minScale!: Float32, ZoomOutPage_minScale!: Float32, ZoomOutPage_minAlpha!: Float32) {
        this.AlphaPage_minAlpha = AlphaPage_minAlpha
        this.DepthPage_minScale = DepthPage_minScale
        this.MZScaleIn_minScale = MZScaleIn_minScale
        this.RotateDownPage_maxRotate = RotateDownPage_maxRotate
        this.RotateUpPage_maxRotate = RotateUpPage_maxRotate
        this.RotateY_maxRotate = RotateY_maxRotate
        this.ScaleIn_minScale = ScaleIn_minScale
        this.ZoomOutPage_minScale = ZoomOutPage_minScale
        this.ZoomOutPage_minAlpha = ZoomOutPage_minAlpha
    }
}

main(): Int64 {
    println("🎯 CActor 完整性能基准测试")
    println("基于仓颉语言的高性能Actor系统")
    println("包含轻量级、中等强度、重量级、CPU密集型、I/O密集型、内存密集型和混合负载测试")
    println("=" * 80)

    // 运行基础工作负载测试
    println("\n🔵 基础工作负载测试")
    println("=" * 50)

    RealisticBenchmarkRunner.runBenchmark("轻量级测试", 10000, 5, 1, false)

    println()
    println("=" * 50)
    RealisticBenchmarkRunner.runBenchmark("中等强度测试", 5000, 8, 2, true)

    println()
    println("=" * 50)
    RealisticBenchmarkRunner.runBenchmark("重量级测试", 1000, 10, 3, true)

    // 运行复杂工作负载测试
    println("\n\n🔴 复杂工作负载测试")
    println("=" * 50)

    println()
    RealisticBenchmarkRunner.runBenchmark("CPU密集型测试", 2000, 6, 4, true)

    println()
    println("=" * 50)
    RealisticBenchmarkRunner.runBenchmark("I/O密集型测试", 500, 4, 5, true)

    println()
    println("=" * 50)
    RealisticBenchmarkRunner.runBenchmark("内存密集型测试", 500, 2, 6, true)

    println()
    println("=" * 50)
    RealisticBenchmarkRunner.runBenchmark("混合负载测试", 1000, 6, 7, true)

    // 打印汇总分析
    println("\n\n📊 CActor 性能分析汇总")
    println("=" * 50)
    println("✅ 轻量级任务: 高吞吐量消息传递，适合微服务通信")
    println("✅ 中等强度任务: 平衡性能，适合一般业务逻辑")
    println("✅ 重量级任务: 复杂计算优势，适合算法密集型应用")
    println("✅ CPU密集型: 优化的数学计算，适合科学计算场景")
    println("✅ I/O密集型: 高效异步处理，适合Web服务和数据库应用")
    println("✅ 内存密集型: 大数据结构操作，适合缓存和内存数据库")
    println("✅ 混合负载: 综合性能表现，适合实际生产环境")

    println()
    println("🎉 CActor 完整基准测试完成！")
    println("📈 展现了全面的性能优势和广泛的应用场景适用性")

    return 0
}

public class RouterConfig {
    public let routerType: RouterType
    public let name: String
    public let description: String
    public let weights: Array<Int32>
    public let primaryIndex: Int32
    public let contentSelector: Option<(Message) -> String>
    public let customStrategy: Option<RoutingStrategy>

    public init(
        routerType: RouterType,
        name: String
    ) {
        this.routerType = routerType
        this.name = name
        this.description = ""
        this.weights = Array<Int32>(0, { _ => 0 })
        this.primaryIndex = 0
        this.contentSelector = None
        this.customStrategy = None
    }

    public init(
        routerType: RouterType,
        name: String,
        description: String,
        weights: Array<Int32>,
        primaryIndex: Int32,
        contentSelector: Option<(Message) -> String>,
        customStrategy: Option<RoutingStrategy>
    ) {
        this.routerType = routerType
        this.name = name
        this.description = description
        this.weights = weights
        this.primaryIndex = primaryIndex
        this.contentSelector = contentSelector
        this.customStrategy = customStrategy
    }
}

main(){
    let s = #"a"#
    println(s == "a")
    let ss = #"
        abcd
        efgh
        ${i}
    "#
    let s2 = "\n        abcd\n        efgh\n        \${i}\n    "
    println(ss == s2) // true
    println("${ss.size} ${s2.size}")
    println(ss)
    println(s2)
}

public enum SyncErrorType {
    case LatencyExceeded
    case DataConflict
    case ConnectionLost
    case ResourceExhausted
    case PerformanceDegradation
    case ConsistencyError
    case NetworkResilienceError
    case Custom(errorType: String)

    public func toString() -> String {
        switch self {
            case .LatencyExceeded: return "latency_exceeded"
            case .DataConflict: return "data_conflict"
            case .ConnectionLost: return "connection_lost"
            case .ResourceExhausted: return "resource_exhausted"
            case .PerformanceDegradation: return "performance_degradation"
            case .ConsistencyError: return "consistency_error"
            case .NetworkResilienceError: return "network_resilience_error"
            case .Custom(let errorType): return errorType
        }
    }
}

protected class ColoringRepresentation<V, E> where V <: Equatable<V> & ToString & Hashable, E <: Equatable<E> & ToString {
    protected let colorClasses: ArrayList<ArrayList<V>>
    protected let positiveDegreeColorClasses: ArrayList<ArrayList<V>>
    protected let maxColorDegree: Array<Int64>
    protected let minColorDegree: Array<Int64>

    protected let colorDegree: Map<V, Int64>
    protected let coloring: Map<V, Int64>
    protected var lastUsedColor: Int64

    public init(graph: Graph<V, E>, alpha: Coloring<V>) {
        let n = graph.vertexSet().size
        this.colorClasses = ArrayList<ArrayList<V>>(n)
        this.positiveDegreeColorClasses = ArrayList<ArrayList<V>>(n)
        this.maxColorDegree = Array<Int64>(n, item: 0)
        this.minColorDegree = Array<Int64>(n, item: 0)
        this.colorDegree = HashMap<V, Int64>()
        this.coloring = HashMap<V, Int64>()

        for (_ in 0..n) {
            colorClasses.append(ArrayList<V>())
            positiveDegreeColorClasses.append(ArrayList<V>())
        }

        for (v in graph.vertexSet()) {
            colorClasses[alpha.getColors()[v]].append(v)
            colorDegree[v] = 0
            coloring[v] = alpha.getColors()[v]
        }

        lastUsedColor = alpha.getNumberColors() - 1
    }
}

public func slice(): RpcByteBuffer

    /**
     * The Function is duplicate
     *
     * @return Type of Buffer
     * @since 0.32.5
     */
    public func duplicate(): RpcByteBuffer

    /**

     */

    /**
     * The Function is get
     *
     * @return Type of UInt8
     * @since 0.32.5
     */

    /**
     * The Function is put
     *
     * @param b of UInt8
     *
     * @return Type of Buffer
     * @since 0.32.5
     */
    public func put(b: UInt8): RpcByteBuffer

    /**
     * The Function is get
     *
     * @param index of Int64
     *
     * @return Type of UInt8
     * @since 0.32.5
     */
    public func get(index: Int64): UInt8

    /**
     * The Function is put
     *
     * @param index of Int64
     * @param b of UInt8
     *
     * @return Type of Buffer
     * @since 0.32.5
     */
    public func put(index: Int64, b: UInt8): RpcByteBuffer

    public func putLong(value: Int64): RpcByteBuffer
    public func putInt(value: Int32): RpcByteBuffer
    public func putShort(value: Int16): RpcByteBuffer
    public func putUInt64(value: UInt64): RpcByteBuffer
    public func putUInt32(value: UInt32): RpcByteBuffer
    public func putUInt16(value: UInt16): RpcByteBuffer

    public func getLong(): Int64
    public func getInt(): Int32
    public func getShort(): Int16
    public func getUInt64(): UInt64
    public func getUInt32(): UInt32
    public func getUInt16(): UInt16
    /**
     * The Function is get
     *
     * @param dst of Array<UInt8>
     * @param offset of Int64
     * @param length of Int64
     *
     * @return Type of Buffer
     * @since 0.32.5
     */
    public func get(dst: Array<UInt8>, offset: Int64, length: Int64) : RpcByteBuffer

    /**
     * The Function is get
     *
     * @param dst of Array<UInt8>
     *
     * @return Type of Buffer
     * @since 0.32.5
     */
    public open func get(dst: Array<UInt8>): RpcByteBuffer {
        return get(dst, 0, dst.size)
    }

public struct CompletionSuggestion {
    public let command: String          // 命令名称
    public let description: String      // 命令描述
    public let category: String         // 命令分类
    public let aliases: ArrayList<String>  // 命令别名
    public let parameters: ArrayList<String>  // 参数列表
    public let examples: ArrayList<String>    // 使用示例
    public let priority: Int64          // 优先级（越高越靠前）

    public init(command: String, description: String, category: String) {
        this.command = command
        this.description = description
        this.category = category
        this.aliases = ArrayList<String>()
        this.parameters = ArrayList<String>()
        this.examples = ArrayList<String>()
        this.priority = 0
    }

    public init(command: String, description: String) {
        this.command = command
        this.description = description
        this.category = "general"
        this.aliases = ArrayList<String>()
        this.parameters = ArrayList<String>()
        this.examples = ArrayList<String>()
        this.priority = 0
    }

    public init(command: String, description: String, category: String,
                aliases: ArrayList<String>, parameters: ArrayList<String>,
                examples: ArrayList<String>, priority: Int64) {
        this.command = command
        this.description = description
        this.category = category
        this.aliases = aliases
        this.parameters = parameters
        this.examples = examples
        this.priority = priority
    }
}

private func unpackExtendedHeader(bytes: Array<Int8>, offset: Int32): Int32 {
        extendedHeaderLength = BufferTools.unpackSynchsafeInteger(
            bytes[Int64(offset)],
            bytes[Int64(offset) + 1],
            bytes[Int64(offset) + 2],
            bytes[Int64(offset) + 3]
        ) + 4
        extendedHeaderData = BufferTools.copyBuffer(
            bytes,
            Int64(offset) + 4,
            Int64(extendedHeaderLength)
        )

        return extendedHeaderLength
    }

protected func initialize(message: String, socketAddress: IPAddress, sysLogServerTimeZone: ?TimeZone): Unit {
        this.rawString = message
        this.rawLength = message.size
        this.socketAddress = socketAddress
        this.message = message
        this.sysLogServerTimeZone = sysLogServerTimeZone
    }

class ChannelzData {
    protected var kpCount: Int64 = 0

    //The number of flows that have started, including those that have completed.
    protected var streamsStarted: Int64 = 0

    /*
     * Client: The number of streams successfully ended by receiving EoS bit set frames from the server.
     * Server side: The number of streams successfully ended by sending frames with the EoS bit set.
     */
    protected var streamsSucceeded: Int64 = 0

    protected var streamsFailed: Int64 = 0

    /*
     * Stores the timestamp of the last stream created.
     * It is of int64 type instead of time time, because the cost of atomic update time is higher.
     * The time variable is greater than the int64 variable.
     * The same is true for LastMsgEntTime and LastMscGrecTime.
     */
    protected var lastStreamCreatedTime: Int64 = 0

    protected var msgSent: Int64 = 0
    protected var msgRecv: Int64 = 0
    protected var lastMsgSentTime: Int64 = 0
    protected var lastMsgRecvTime: Int64 = 0
}

main() {
    let leftValue = 2
    let rightValue = 10u64

    let expValue = leftValue ** rightValue
    println(expValue)

    let floatLeftValue = 2.0
    let floatRightValue = -2.0

    let floatExpValue = floatLeftValue ** floatRightValue
    println(floatExpValue)
}

public func gengammaPlot() {

    fplot({x => gengammaPDF(x, 5.0, -3.0)}, 0.2, 1.5).display_name("a=5,c=-3")
    hold(true)
    fplot({x => gengammaPDF(x, 3.0, -1.0)}, 0.2, 1.5).display_name("a=3,c=-1")
    fplot({x => gengammaPDF(x, 1.0, 3.0)},  0.2, 1.5).display_name("a=1,c=3")
    hold(false)
    title("Gengamma PDF Plot")
    xlabel("x")
    ylabel("f(x)")
    legend(true)
    save("./tests/imgs/stats/continuous/gengamma/gengammapdf.png", "png")
    clear()

    fplot({x => gengammaCDF(x, 5.0, -3.0)}, 0.2, 1.5).display_name("a=5,c=-3")
    hold(true)
    fplot({x => gengammaCDF(x, 3.0, -1.0)}, 0.2, 1.5).display_name("a=3,c=-1")
    fplot({x => gengammaCDF(x, 1.0, 3.0)},  0.2, 1.5).display_name("a=1,c=3")
    hold(false)
    title("Gengamma CDF Plot")
    xlabel("x")
    ylabel("F(x)")
    legend(true)
    save("./tests/imgs/stats/continuous/gengamma/gengammacdf.png", "png")
    clear()
}
